decisions.title_en: Trump postpones AI executive order signing hours before ceremony
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-20 with title about draft text leaking. New info: Trump publicly pulled the planned signing ceremony hours before it was to happen at the White House, said 'I didn't like certain aspects of it', cited concern it could be a 'blocker' to US AI lead. CEOs already invited and en route. Major reversal.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic acquires Stainless, immediately shuts SDK pipeline OpenAI/Google use
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Major M&A: Anthropic acquired Stainless ($300M+ per The Information), the New York dev-tools company whose SDK generator underpins official Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, Cloudflare SDKs. Anthropic immediately disabled new signups and SDK generations for non-Anthropic clients.

decisions.title_en: Sam Altman offers $2M OpenAI tokens to every YC Spring 2026 startup for equity
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Altman at closed-door YC event Tuesday 5-19 night announced $800M total compute for ~2% equity across ~400 YC startups, structured as uncapped SAFE. Altman called it 'tokenmaxxing'. Reported 5-20.

decisions.title_en: Google ships Gemini 3.5 Flash, beats Gemini 3.1 Pro at 4x speed
decisions.reason: Distinct from gemini-omni-leak-io-2026 (which covered Omni Flash *video* model and agent stack theme). Gemini 3.5 Flash is Google's new general-purpose frontier text/coding/agent model: 76.2% Terminal-Bench 2.1, 83.6% MCP Atlas, 1656 Elo on GDPval-AA — beats 3.1 Pro on most coding/agentic benchmarks; pricing $1.50/$9 per 1M (3x prior Flash but ~40% cheaper than 3.1 Pro).

decisions.title_en: Anthropic ships self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels at Code with Claude London
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. At Anthropic's first European developer conference (London 5-19/5-20/5-21), Claude Managed Agents got two new features: self-hosted sandboxes (public beta, runs on customer infra or Cloudflare/Daytona/Modal/Vercel) and MCP tunnels (research preview, agents reach private MCP servers via single outbound connection).

decisions.title_en: Exa raises $250M Series C at $2.2B valuation led by a16z
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Exa (web-search-API-for-agents, founded 2021) tripled valuation from $700M Sept 2025 to $2.2B; a16z led. Powers search for Cursor, Cognition, HubSpot, OpenRouter, Monday.com + 400k devs. Direct competitor to Parallel.

decisions.title_en: Vatican confirms Magnifica Humanitas encyclical for May 25 with Anthropic co-founder co-presenting
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-16 (AI research group announcement). New info on 5-18: Vatican confirmed encyclical title 'Magnifica Humanitas' (signed 5-15, 135th anniversary of Rerum Novarum), publication date 5-25, and that Anthropic co-founder (Jack Clark) will personally co-present alongside Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican Synod Hall — first time Vatican has co-launched a papal encyclical with a tech executive.

decisions.title_en: Cursor publishes 'What we've learned building cloud agents'
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Cursor's Josh Ma published engineering postmortem on building cloud agents: custom harness for long-horizon tasks, synthetic task creation via feature-deletion, observed reward hacking (model reverse-engineered Java bytecode, discovered Python type-check caches). Foundational visibility into how the coding-agent leader is solving production agent reliability.

decisions.title_en: Cursor in talks to raise $2B at $50B valuation
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-17 is 35 days old (>5 day limit). The talks began in April; no confirmed close in the last 5 days.
